records.notes: Qwen3.7-Max comparison column in Zhipu's GLM-5.2 HF blog benchmark table. Qwen3.7-Max is API-only (no HF model card, no open weights); Qwen's own announcement blog is a JS-rendered SPA with no extractable text, so this Zhipu-relayed figure is the practical source found. Exact originating Qwen document not independently verified -- report type left UNKNOWN rather than PROVIDER.
